scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,accounts,transactions,products,reporting -c blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta "pnpm --prefix Auth-Service dev" "pnpm --prefix Account-Management-Service dev" "pnpm --prefix Transaction-Processing-Service dev" "pnpm --prefix Product-Management-Service dev" "pnpm --prefix Reporting-Analytics-Service dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n auth,accounts,transactions,products,reporting -c blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta "pnpm --prefix Auth-Service start" "pnpm --prefix Account-Management-Service start" "pnpm --prefix Product-Management-Service start" "pnpm --prefix Transaction-Processing-Service start" "pnpm --prefix Reporting-Analytics-Service start"
